title: white sharp shader
description: An abstract, stylized and high-performance Minecraft shader that will make your gaming experience unique.
body:
# **Important**
The shader is at an **early stage** of development and I plan to update it, **Watch for updates**. 

# **Description**
performance shaders for minecraft. which will turn the whole world into black with white lines.
You can also use this shader to create masks in photo editor.
# **Image**
## Rainbow update!
![Rainbow ](https://github.com/playsi/white-sharp-shader/blob/master/rainbow_preview.png?raw=true)
## Black white
![night hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ee82a17818885184d8737d1fb9a0b29db644bd9.png)
